nasb.text: And we are witnesses of these things; and so is the Holy Spirit, whom God has given to those who obey Him.”

esv.text: And we are witnesses to these things, and so is the Holy Spirit, whom God has given to those who obey him.”

cnv.text: 我們為這些事作證，　神賜給順從的人的聖靈也為這些事作證。”

ccb.text: 我们就是这些事的见证人，上帝赐给顺服祂之人的圣灵也同样做见证。”

csbs.text: 我们就是这些事的见证人。神所赐给那些顺从他之人的圣灵也一同做见证。”
